snippet.title: Shadow’s H? Remake (read the description)
snippet.description: Saturday, while I try to make another track on GarageBand, I have no more space on my phone storage. So I tried to delete my old stuff but it didn’t work. So I off loaded FL Studio mobile but accidentally deleted the app later. That cause the app lose all the data that is has inside the app sadly. 😔 But I still have my old FLM Files from my old phone to the computer and put in onto my iPhone and decided to remake all of my FLM Files.

音声も映像も使用自由

映像は素材です。音声も素材ですが、MBLフレアが使えない人はこの動画を使えばいいかもしれません
音声はDissonance Mystery Hを再利用しました
